creator: jhs@berklix.com
text:
Fix: Patch in diff -c format:
-----------
http://berklix.com/~jhs/src/bsd/fixes/FreeBSD/ports/gen/devel/autoconf-wrapper/Makefile.REL=ALL.diff

Allow repeated top makes calling lots of dependencies that call
make install reinstall package package-recursive etc
to survive without error

This is '-' should also be prepended to at least all of
6.3-RELEASE 6.4-RELEASE 7.1-RELEASE 7.2-RELEASE 7.3-RELEASE 8.0-RELEASE current
How-To-Repeat: 	
	cd /usr/ports/devel/autoconf-wrapper ; make install ; make reinstall
